title: Bounded Induction Obligation Checks

solver_reuse.target: bounded induction step-count QF_LIA/arithmetic-DPLL regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite replay over k = 0..8 computes zero prefix-sum step counterexamples, while the malformed row asks for at least one bounded bad step.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote the bounded conclusion row only if it adds distinct finite-prefix counting pressure; keep the full natural-number induction schema in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode bounded base and step obligations as deterministic QF_LIA or QF_BV formulas.
Replay finite SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the bounded step no-counterexample row tied to source-linked QF_LIA arithmetic-DPLL evidence after finite replay computes the bad-step count.
Emit checked evidence for the bounded conclusion no-counterexample row only when it adds distinct solver pressure.
Keep the full induction schema marked Lean-horizon until a no-sorry Lean route assembles the obligations into a universal theorem.
